description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:19.03.2 image with a docker:19.03.2-dind service, setting DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR variables and a global before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define three stages: test, prepare, and build, and include a hidden .build job that retries twice, runs the script ci/build.sh, and belongs to the build stage. Add a nothing_to_build job in the build stage that simply echoes 'All versions are already built, skipping'. In the test stage add a test-ci-generator job that uses the python:3.7-alpine image, runs a before_script to cd into ci-generator, check python version, install virtualenv, create and activate a venv, and pip install -r requirements.txt, caches .cache/pip and ci-generator/venv/, sets PIP_CACHE_DIR, then executes coverage run -m unittest tests/test*.py, coverage report, and coverage html, and stores the ci-generator/htmlcov directory as an artifact while capturing coverage with the regex /^TOTAL.*\s+(\d+\%)$/. No additional rules or deployment targets are defined.
